search_query: how to get better at sports
retrieved_result: What are some interesting Guinness World Records? Shubham Utkarsh, studied at Indian Institute of Information Technology, Allahabad Answered Aug 20, 2017 · Author has 591 answers and 1.1m answer views A. Gorske of Go, Murica, U. S. A consumed his 26,000th Mc Donald's Big Mac on October 11, 2012 — after 40 years of eating Big Macs on a daily basis.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses Guinness World Records and a fast-food eater, not content related to improving athletic performance or sports-related guidance.
